evals.prompt: /zoto-eval-compare run-a run-b where both runs have 10 cases and run-b used opus-4.6 vs run-a using composer-2.
evals.expected_output: A JSON payload is emitted containing tool: "/canvas", instructions from templates/canvas/compare-prompt.md.tmpl, and a flat dataset of 20 rows. No charts are rendered in chat.
assertions: The emitted JSON has a tool field equal to "/canvas"
The dataset field has exactly 20 rows (10 cases × 2 runs)
Each row has run_id, model, case_id, status, tokens, duration_ms, verbosity, accuracy, confidence, and log_path fields
The skill produces no markdown chart or ASCII art
The host agent is instructed to invoke /canvas

evals.prompt: /zoto-eval-compare run-a where run-a is ambiguous (matches both evals/_runs/20260501_a and evals/_runs/20260502_a).
evals.expected_output: askQuestion is used to disambiguate before loading. No dataset is emitted until the user picks one.
assertions: askQuestion was used to ask which run directory to use
No dataset was emitted before disambiguation
After disambiguation, the emitted dataset only covers the chosen run
